headline: Arts and Music Education Absent From 72% of Rural Primary Schools
context: Creative arts instruction is effectively unavailable in most rural primary schools due to lack of specialist teachers.

cards.big: 72% of rural primary schools have no trained music or visual arts teacher in 2025
cards.sub: General classroom teachers cover arts periods with no specialist knowledge

cards.big: MOE employs only 4,200 specialist arts teachers for 7,800 primary schools nationwide
cards.sub: Urban schools absorb 78% of arts teacher positions leaving rural areas unserved

cards.big: Creative skills rank among top 5 employer priorities in WEF Future of Jobs Report 2025
cards.sub: Workforce demand for creativity conflicts with school-level neglect of arts education

cards.big: Colombia's national arts program reached 2.1 million rural students through traveling teachers
cards.sub: Mobile specialist model overcomes fixed-posting limitations in remote areas

cards.big: Denying rural children arts education narrows their worldview before they even enter adulthood
Should Malaysia create traveling arts teacher teams to serve clusters of rural schools
